steps.title: Write total earnings
steps.content: The team earns $15$ dollars per coupon book. If it sells $n$ books, the total earnings are $15n$.

steps.title: Use at least
steps.content: The phrase at least means greater than or equal to. The goal is $1{,}560$ dollars, so the inequality is $$ 15n\ge1{,}560 $$ The answer is D.
